description.value: Price 30,320 gp; Slot none; CL 7th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This +2 rapier has elegant lines and a stylish basket hilt. The wielder of this weapon gains a +5 competence bonus on Acrobatics checks made to move through an enemy’s threatened area or through its space. As a swift action after hitting with a melee attack using this weapon, the wielder can spend 1 panache point to move 10 feet without provoking attacks of opportunity. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 15,350 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells freedom of movement; Special creator must have 10 ranks in Craft (weapons)
